cause_analysis.narrative: Her Reset Wellness churned on 2026-03-18 after 136 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 21-day silence starting 2026-03-18. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 3 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Implement a 'cancellation keyword' realtime alert to AMs + Growth team. Today this signal is discovered only post-churn.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 3 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-01-07 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Accepted: Her Reset Wellness X Zoca | Check In January @ Wed Jan 7, 2026 10:30pm - 11pm (GMT+5:30) (santhosh.v@…" — no outbound response in 15 days.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-09 via app_chat, client wrote: "I dont want to connect. Please cancel this is final notice!…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

messages.body: Hey Tash, Nikita here! Just wanted to let you know that your subscription was canceled weeks ago. You’ve also been offboarded from Zoca, and no further charges are being applied.

I dont want to connect. Please cancel this is final notice!

Request Closed
